_meta.purpose: Arterial/venous blood gas (ABG/VBG) reference + acid-base interpretation for the rules engine + LLM. Decision support only; interpret with clinical context + electrolytes + lactate.
_meta.source: Standard blood-gas / acid-base references. Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

pco2.name: pCO2
pco2.note: Respiratory component. High -> resp acidosis/hypoventilation; low -> resp alkalosis/hyperventilation. (~35-45 mmHg).

po2.name: pO2 (arterial)
po2.note: <8 kPa (60 mmHg) = respiratory failure (type 1 if pCO2 normal/low, type 2 if pCO2 high).

hco3.name: Bicarbonate (HCO3-)
hco3.note: Metabolic component. Low -> metabolic acidosis; high -> metabolic alkalosis.

base_excess.name: Base excess
base_excess.note: Negative -> metabolic acidosis; positive -> metabolic alkalosis.

metabolic_acidosis.pattern: low pH, low HCO3, negative BE
metabolic_acidosis.note: High AG -> lactate/ketones/toxins/uraemia (MUDPILES); normal AG -> GI/renal HCO3 loss (RTA, diarrhoea).

respiratory_acidosis.note: Hypoventilation (COPD, opioids, neuromuscular). Chronic -> renal HCO3 compensation.

respiratory_alkalosis.note: Hyperventilation (anxiety, pain, PE, sepsis, salicylate early).

type2_resp_failure.note: Watch for CO2 narcosis; controlled O2 in COPD.
